empty_kpi_body: The ledger is empty for the selected filters. Go to *Data entry* to record the first emission, or change the fiscal year in the sidebar.
onboarding_body:
Three steps to get started:

1. **Record emissions** for the fiscal year from the *Data entry* section.
2. **Check data quality** in the *DQ Findings* section.
3. **Export** the ESRS E1 PDF report from the *Export Reports* section.
login_error_shape: Username (min {min_user} chars) and password (min {min_pass} chars) are required.
login_demo_hint: Demo: enter any username/password for a demo token.
login_demo_warning: ⚠️ DEMO MODE active (GHG_DEMO_MODE=true). Authentication is bypassed: any username/password meeting the minimum length will be admitted with a demo token. Do NOT use in production.
login_real_hint: Authenticated login. Credentials are verified by the backend.
demo_mode_banner: DEMO MODE: you are authenticated with a demo token. The data and roles shown are not guaranteed by the backend.
biogenic_memo: Biogenic Memo (E1-7: not included in totals)
pdf_subtitle: ESRS E1-6 + E1-7 | WeasyPrint | VIANO 2025 disclosure if applicable
excel_subtitle: 11 sheets | Cell-level metadata | Okabe-Ito header fill
pdf_error_msg: PDF generation failed. Please contact your ESG Manager.
viano_banner: Reduced operation at VIANO site in 2025: interpret YoY comparisons with caution.
biogenic_adv007: Biogenic CO2 emissions from combustion of biomass and biogas are disclosed separately under E1-7. They are not included in Scope 1/2/3 totals per ADR-007 and GHG Protocol Corporate Standard §4.5.
no_data: No data available for the selected filters.
error_api: API call failed. Please check your connection.
filter_warn_material: Warning: current filter excludes material data.
intensity_endpoint_missing: ENDPOINT /api/v1/intensity NOT AVAILABLE: BackendAgent must implement it before this page can display live data.
report_disclaimer: This report is automatically generated by GHG Accounting Tool v1. Values are calculated per the GHG Protocol Corporate Standard (2004) and ESRS E1. The report is subject to review by the ESG Manager prior to external disclosure.
no_results: No results for the selected filters.
no_biogenic_in_period: No biogenic emissions in the selected period.
justification_too_short: Justification must be at least 10 characters.
publication_queue_caption: Publishing a factor makes it immutable (rule MG-02). TBC factors and factors without a value cannot be published.
publish_success: Factor published. Now frozen and tracked in calc.audit_log.
publish_already_done: This factor is already published (or was just published by another user).
publish_validation_failed: Publication not allowed: factor is TBC or has no value.
publish_forbidden: Only the esg_manager role can publish factors.
publish_notes_placeholder: E.g. Alignment with ISPRA 2024 p. 17; updated k = 0.267 kg CO2e/kWh.
admin_role_required: Only users with the Administrator role can access this page.
admin_intro: User management for your tenant. Passwords are stored as bcrypt hashes only; the plaintext is never logged.
admin_users_empty: No users yet. Create the first one from the form below.
admin_users_create_caption: The new user will belong to your tenant and can log in immediately. The creation is recorded in calc.audit_log.
admin_password_hint: At least 8 characters. Share it securely with the new user: you cannot recover it later.
admin_user_created: User created. Share the initial password securely.
admin_duplicate: A user with that username or email already exists in this tenant.
admin_validation_failed: Invalid input: check username (>= 3 chars), valid email, and password (>= 8 chars).
admin_audit_note: All user creations are tracked in calc.audit_log.
